Comment.MultiLanguageText: Starting Q address of the KP8

AttributeList.Text: Enable/Disable button is green when eabled otherwise is white
If there is an error flash red on Reset
Color: Not Enabled then Off Enabled and not presses then White Enabled and presses then flash White/Blue
Color: Not Enabled then Off Enabled and not presses then White Enabled and presses then flash White/Blue
Copy LED value to KP8 simulator on the HMI
